apierror-kartographer-conflicting-revids: Weydiinta mapdata ee dib u eegisyo badan oo isla bogga ah hal codsi laguma taageero weli.
kartographer-attribution: [https://foundation.wikimedia.org/wiki/Maps_Terms_of_Use Khariidadaha Wikimedia] | Xogta khariidadaha © [https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright Ka qaybqaatayaasha OpenStreetMap]
kartographer-broken-category-desc: Boggu wuxuu ka kooban yahay isticmaal khariidad aan sax ahayn
kartographer-desc: Waxay oggolaanaysaa in khariidado lagu daro bogagga wiki-ga
kartographer-error-json-object: Nuxurku waa inuu ahaadaa GeoJSON+simplestyle sax ah ama liis ka kooban walxo noocaas ah.
kartographer-error-json-type: Walax kasta oo GeoJSON+simplestyle ah waa inay lahaataa nooc aan madhnayn, tusaale { "type": "Feature" }.
kartographer-error-bad_attr: Astaanta "$1" waxay leedahay qiime aan sax ahayn
kartographer-error-bad_data: Nuxurka JSON-ka ma aha GeoJSON+simplestyle sax ah. Liiska hoose wuxuu muujinayaa dhammaan isku dayadii lagu fasiray iyadoo loo eegayo [https://phabricator.wikimedia.org/diffusion/EKAR/browse/master/schemas/geojson.json qaabka JSON Schema]. Dhammaantood khalad ma aha.
kartographer-error-latlon: Ama labada xuduudood "latitude" iyo "longitude" waa in la wada siiyaa ama labaduba lama siin karo
kartographer-error-title: Cinwaanka "$1" ma aha bog xog khariidad sax ah
kartographer-tracking-category-desc: Boggu wuxuu ka kooban yahay khariidad
kartographer-specialmap-invalid-coordina: Isku-duwayaal aan sax ahayn ayaa la bixiyay
kartographer-sidebar-externalservices-sh: Muuji kuwa la soo xulay oo keliya
leafletdraw-draw-handlers-circle-tooltip: Riix oo jiid si aad u sawirto goobo
leafletdraw-draw-handlers-marker-tooltip: Riix khariidadda si aad u dhigto calaamad
leafletdraw-draw-handlers-circlemarker-t: Riix khariidadda si aad u dhigto calaamad goobo ah
leafletdraw-draw-handlers-polygon-toolti: Riix si aad u sii waddo sawiridda qaabkan
Riix barta ugu horreysa si aad u xir
Riix si aad u bilowdo sawiridda qaab
leafletdraw-draw-handlers-polyline-error: Khalad: xuduudaha qaabku isma goyn karaan
leafletdraw-draw-handlers-polyline-toolt: Riix si aad u sii waddo sawiridda xariiqdan
Riix barta ugu dambeysa si aad u dhammayso xariiqdan
Riix si aad u bilowdo sawiridda xariiq
leafletdraw-draw-handlers-rectangle-tool: Riix oo jiid si aad u sawirto leydi
leafletdraw-draw-handlers-simpleshape-to: Sii daa jiirka si aad u dhammayso sawiridda
leafletdraw-draw-toolbar-undo-title: Tirtir barta ugu dambeysa ee la sawiray
leafletdraw-edit-handlers-edit-tooltip-s: Riix jooji si aad u baabi'iso isbeddellada
leafletdraw-edit-handlers-edit-tooltip-t: Jiid gacmaha ama calaamadda si aad u tafatirto astaanta
leafletdraw-edit-handlers-remove-tooltip: Riix astaanta si aad u tirtirto
leafletdraw-edit-toolbar-actions-cancel-: Jooji wax ka beddelka, iska tuur dhammaan isbeddellada
leafletdraw-edit-toolbar-buttons-editdis: Ma jiraan walxo la wax ka beddelo
leafletdraw-draw-toolbar-finish-title: Guji si aad u dhammaystirto sawirka
visualeditor-mwmapsdialog-display-help:
Deji booska jiifka ah ee khariidadda bogga. Waxyaabaha kale ee bogga waxay ku wareegayaan khariidadda kaliya haddii la dhigo midig ama bidix, ma aha dhexda.

Deminta qaabka jirka waxay ka dhigaysaa khariidadda la geliyay in lagu muujiyo iyada oo aan lahayn xuduud, sida sawirrada aan lahayn jir. Xulashadan waa la damiyaa haddii khariidaddu leedahay sharaxaad.
visualeditor-mwmapsdialog-caption-help:
Sharaxaadani waxay ka muuqan doontaa hoosta khariidadda gudaha jirka (sida sharaxaad sawir). Ku darista sharaxaad waxay khasab ka dhigaysaa in khariidaddu yeelato jir.

Qaabeynta wikitext waa la adeegsan karaa halkan, tusaale ahaan qoraal culus, xiriiriyeyaal, ama tixraacyo.
visualeditor-mwmapsdialog-language-help: Kartographer wuxuu si caadi ah u adeegsadaa luqadda nuxurka ee wiki-ga si uu u muujiyo calaamadaha khariidadda. Tan waxaa loo beddeli karaa dejintan si ay u khuseyso khariidaddan oo keliya. Isticmaal local halkii aad ka adeegsan lahayd magaca luqad si loo muujiyo dhammaan calaamadaha luqadda maxalliga ah ee goobtaas. Tusaale ahaan, magacyada magaalooyinka Mexico waxaa lagu muujinayaa Isbaanish, halka kuwa Japan lagu muujinayo Jabaaniis. Marka calaamadaha aan laga helin luqadda la doortay, Kartographer wuxuu raacaa hab dib u dhac. Wixii faahfaahin dheeraad ah ka eeg bogga caawinta Kartographer: [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Extension:Kartographer#Languages_and_fallbacks Bogga caawinta Kartographer].
visualeditor-mwmapsdialog-language-local: $1 (isticmaal luqadda maxalliga ah ee aagga khariidad kasta)
visualeditor-mwmapsdialog-help-title: Baro sida loo sameeyo loona tafatiro khariidado.
visualeditor-mwmapscontextitem-nosupport: Khariidadan waxay leedahay astaamo isbeddelaya, waxaana hadda lagu tafatiri karaa oo keliya qaabka isha.
